title: Cheaper Armor Trim Duplication
body:
Makes armor trim duplication cheaper.

Before:

![Seven diamonds and one cobblestone block needed.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kbPTsF62/images/9357ed4db290b4c01ea064dc07a103c79724f3ef.png)

After:

![One diamond and seven cobblestone blocks needed.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kbPTsF62/images/d196831fab784a284fd280a4f42f1f9e0e66e816.png)
